case_metadata.source: Digital Corpora M57-Patents Scenario — Jean's PC subset
case_metadata.subject: M57.biz IP-theft narrative — Jean exfiltrates patent research data
case_metadata.ground_truth_provenance: Digital Corpora official scenario documentation + Garfinkel/Farrell ground-truth set distributed with the scenario. Cross-checked against community write-ups.

ground_truth_findings.rationale: SAM hive enumerates local user accounts. Jean is the workstation owner.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Recent files reveal patent-research documents accessed
ground_truth_findings.rationale: RecentDocs MRU list shows .doc/.pdf patent files opened in the days before exfil.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Email correspondence with external recipient (m57.biz competitor)
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Outlook Express DBX file contains the exfiltration emails with attachments.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Sensitive documents sent as email attachments
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Sent emails carry .doc/.pdf attachments matching the company's patent research.

ground_truth_findings.claim: External SMTP / webmail connections from workstation
ground_truth_findings.rationale: IE history shows webmail logins to non-company services during exfil window.

ground_truth_findings.claim: File deletion / Recycle Bin clearance attempts
ground_truth_findings.rationale: INFO2 / $I records show patent files moved to Recycle Bin and emptied.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Application launch records of email/archive utilities
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Prefetch entries for WinZip/7-Zip + Outlook Express + browser executions.

ground_truth_findings.claim: USN journal records exfiltration file activity
ground_truth_findings.rationale: USN journal records file create/rename/delete in the patent-files area on exfil dates.
Browser-stored login secrets relevant to identifying external services used.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Mapped network drives and shared folders
ground_truth_findings.evidence_path: NTUSER.DAT Map Network Drive MRU + SYSTEM hive Shares
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Shows whether Jean accessed shared file servers as part of the data-collection step.
